target_text: Audio fingerprint confirms live human performance. Not synthetic.
original_output: The track is human-authored. The nuances in the guitar strumming and the overall melody suggest a human touch rather than the uniformity typically associated with AI-generated music.
final_output: Audio fingerprint confirms live human performance. Not synthetic.
